name: P5_unblock_rollback_h1
summary: H-1 CONFIRMED: A 解卡点后 useUnblockTask 尝试 PATCH X，PB 返回 HTTP 404（A 不在 X.assignees），前端 try/catch 静默吞掉 → X.status 永远停留 in_progress 而非 completed。
details: T created: id=biu6zao1e4tb1di assignee=A status=blocked blocker.rollback_to=X
X reset to in_progress via admin (simulating prior rollback)
A PATCH X (rollback to completed) → HTTP 404
warnings: 修复方案：either (a) PB hook 拦截 unblock 时由系统代理回写 X.status；或 (b) 前端检测 403 后弹「请联系 X 的负责人手动恢复」提示；或 (c) 把回写权限授给 rollback 源任务的所有 assignees。

name: P6_handoff_from_foreign_task
summary: PB ALLOWS A to create handoff from B's task — handoffs.createRule 太宽（@request.auth.id != ""），应限制为 from_task.assignees ~ auth.id || role in (admin,manager)
details: A POST handoff with from_task=B's task → HTTP 200

name: P7_cross_project_task_list
summary: PB listRule 正确隔离: A 看到 0/2 条 proj_B 任务

name: P8_audit_logs_cross_project
summary: audit_logs 跨项目泄露：A（不在 proj_B members）能看到 proj_B 的 audit_log。当前 listRule = '@request.auth.id != ""'，无项目过滤。
details: seed audit_log in proj_B (by B) → HTTP 200
warnings: 修复建议：listRule 改为 '@request.auth.role = "admin" || @request.auth.role = "manager" || project.members ~ @request.auth.id || operator = @request.auth.id'
